session.title: Designing a Mountain Warfare H5P Branching Scenario with AI-assisted Media
session.topic_summary: The session collaboratively designed and refined a tactical decision branching scenario for Small Unit Leaders in Mountain Warfare. It covered competency mapping (SULMW4-1…4), decision/feedback copy, variant branches, plus video, audio, and image prompts for FlexClip and Nano Banana Pro, with NotebookLM used for research synthesis. Final outputs included flow charts, mission outcome tables, concise H5P feedback, and slides summarizing AI tool value and metrics.

competencies.name: Instructional Systems Design & Learning Experience Architecture
Risk & Contingency Planning in Training Scenarios

axes.label: Design Rigor
axes.description: Quality and completeness of branching logic, feedback, and mapping to competencies.

axes.label: Media Prompts
axes.description: Breadth and specificity of video/audio/image prompts for production.

axes.label: Research Synthesis
axes.description: Use of NotebookLM to aggregate sources and generate structured notes.

axes.label: Strategic Framing
axes.description: Clarity in value statements, ROI metrics, and stakeholder slides.

axes.label: Operational Realism
axes.description: Integration of mountain-warfare constraints, logistics, and casualty variants.

blooms_progression.label: Remember
blooms_progression.title: Recall of doctrine & phases
blooms_progression.description: Referenced SULMW4-1..4 competencies, phases, and scoring thresholds; listed decision points and options accurately.

blooms_progression.label: Understand
blooms_progression.title: Concept explanations
blooms_progression.description: Explained logistics constraints, ridge vs draw tradeoffs, and defensive siting implications in concise learner-facing text.

blooms_progression.label: Apply
blooms_progression.title: Applied to H5P
blooms_progression.description: Converted doctrine into H5P-ready prompts, feedback fields, and hotspot descriptions respecting window limits.

blooms_progression.label: Analyze
blooms_progression.title: Branching & risk analysis
blooms_progression.description: Compared resupply strategies, route choices, and cold-weather procedures; created casualty-variant decision logic.

blooms_progression.label: Evaluate
blooms_progression.title: Scoring & feedback critique
blooms_progression.description: Assigned scores, pros/cons, and feedback titles; evaluated trade-offs and exposure risks across options.

blooms_progression.label: Create
blooms_progression.title: Original media & slides
blooms_progression.description: Authored new video/audio/image prompts, mission outcome tables, and slide-ready summaries for stakeholder communication.

timeline.title: Intro & Screen 0 Video Prompt
timeline.description: Defined a cinematic mission-brief video; adapted to visual-only constraints due to overlay issues.

timeline.title: Decision 1 A/B/C Media & VO
timeline.description: Produced video prompts and leader audio scripts for heavy, balanced, and light load options.

timeline.title: 1.2 Rehearsal Feedback & Media
timeline.description: Delivered concise feedback for options A/B/C, 4s training insert prompt, and command VO.

timeline.title: Logistics Phase Prompts
timeline.description: Created logistics overview image prompt and feedback for primary resupply decision.

timeline.title: Route Selection & Variant
timeline.description: Built ridge vs draw image and feedback; designed casualty branch for split-platoon choice.

timeline.title: Defensive Siting & Construction
timeline.description: Authored feedback for reverse-slope siting and construction/camouflage; produced outcome images.

timeline.title: Outcomes & Slide Materials
timeline.description: Compiled mission outcome table, FlexClip metrics, NotebookLM metrics, and three-slide summaries.

employer_value.title: Rapid Course Prototyping
employer_value.description: Demonstrated ability to turn doctrinal content into an interactive branching scenario with measurable outcomes and media assets in hours, not days.

employer_value.title: Operationally Realistic Design
employer_value.description: Integrated logistics, terrain, and cold-weather effects into decisions and feedback, improving training relevance for small unit leaders.

employer_value.title: Cross-Tool Orchestration
employer_value.description: Coordinated NotebookLM research, Copilot authoring, and FlexClip production pipelines to deliver consistent, reusable learning assets.

portfolio.title: Mountain Warfare Tactical Decision Branching Scenario
portfolio.subtitle: SELF-DIRECTED · APPLIED · DOCUMENTED

meta.notes: Metrics are derived from explicit counts and estimates discussed in-session. Duration and ROI/time-saved values are conservative approximations based on the breadth of authored assets (27 media prompts, 16 NotebookLM artifacts). Cognitive scores reflect sustained creation and evaluation across multiple branches.
